description: MITRE is a nonprofit organization that operates federally funded R&D centers and publishes research, frameworks, and standards-related resources across cybersecurity, defense, healthcare, transportation, and other sectors. Its public website includes informational content such as MITRE ATT&CK overview pages and publications.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on mitre.org itself. The site exposes informational pages and PDFs about standards and frameworks, but no documented MITRE-hosted HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, MCP servers, or CLIs on mitre.org/subdomains were identified.
